name: The EternalVoice Factory
description: The old EternaVox speaker factory is broadcasting again. On frequencies that shouldn't exist.
lore: Buchanan was a factory town. EternaVox Acoustics made speakers here
from 1927 to 2006. Best sound equipment in the world.
The factory's been empty for twenty years.
But last week, the test lab started transmitting.
Not radio. Not audio. Something else entirely.
The signal makes your fillings hum.

eternavox_basement.name: EternaVox Sub-Basement
eternavox_basement.description: Soundproofed corridors. Dead speakers line the walls. Something is humming.

granny.name: Granny
granny.description: Quest giver in The EternalVoice Factory.
dialog_start: Granny: I worked the EternaVox line for forty years.
Granny: Best speakers ever made. Right here in Buchanan.
Granny: The factory's been dark since '06.
Granny: But the anechoic chamber is active again.
Granny: Something is broadcasting from the sub-basement.
Granny: Frequencies that shouldn't be possible.
dialog_complete: Granny: Some frequencies aren't meant to be heard.
Granny: Here — my old prototype mic. Still works perfect.

boss.name: The Resonance
dialog: Every speaker in the factory fires at once.
The sound coalesces into a shape. A voice.
Resonance: I AM THE PERFECT FREQUENCY.
Resonance: I WAS BORN IN THE ANECHOIC CHAMBER.
Resonance: AND I WILL BE HEARD.
